hero.title: Your time, logged.
hero.subtitle: Track the hours you've put into each step you've joined. Change a step's status from the project page when you're ready.

empty.searchDescription: Try a different keyword or clear the search.
empty.completedDescription: Mark a step completed from the project page and it'll show up here.
empty.activeTitle: You haven’t joined any steps yet.
empty.activeDescription: Find a project, join a step, then come back here to log time.
